creator: tut@nhamon.com.ua
text:
Hi Stefan,

Thank you for the fix. I have attached a patch for the recent SIPp SVN
snapshot. Note that it was decided to move the port to 'benchmark'
category.

Also the PR overrides ports/117305 and ports/117463.

BTW, have you discussed your infile.cpp patch with sipp developers in
their mailing list?

-- 
Artem Naluzhnyy
